title: jasminum carissoides
intro: Jasminum carissoides, commonly known as Sweet Briar or Starry Jasmine, is a flowering plant species native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its roots, leaves, and flowers exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Jasminum carissoides include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress-related issues. Herbal preparations of Jasminum carissoides include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed internally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
